mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.0%, the Federal Reserve maintains a restrictive monetary stance that keeps real rates elevated. This suppresses equity valuations and increases bond yields as investors demand higher compensation for duration risk. The 10-year Treasury yield rises as the market prices in sustained rate pressure.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines in more than 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS > 4.0%, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate (UNRATE increase > 0.2pp over 3 months) signals labor market deterioration and recession risk. This triggers a flight-to-safety bid in Treasuries, compressing yields as investors reduce equity exposure and rotate into fixed income. The 10-year Treasury yield falls.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises in more than 50% of triggered instances, or correlation between UNRATE changes and yield changes is positive (opposite of predicted direction) over any 12-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) jointly signal consumer demand strength. When both series show month-over-month growth > 1.5%, aggregate demand accelerates, inflation expectations rise, and the Fed maintains or raises rates. The 10-year Treasury yield rises as the market reprices inflation and rate expectations upward.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both grow > 1.5% MoM
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines in more than 50% of instances when both RSAFS and HOUST grow > 1.5% MoM, or joint signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) growth above 0.5% MoM indicates robust supply-side capacity utilization and pricing power. This sustains inflation pressures and justifies higher real rates. The 10-year Treasury yield rises as the market prices in persistent inflation and Fed rate maintenance at elevated levels.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines in more than 55% of instances when INDPRO > 0.5% MoM, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: CPI inflation (CPIAUCSL) and the federal funds rate interact to determine real rate expectations. When CPIAUCSL growth accelerates (YoY > 3.5%) while FEDFUNDS remains below 4.5%, real rates are negative or near-zero. The market reprices inflation risk upward, and the 10-year Treasury yield rises as investors demand higher nominal yields to protect real purchasing power.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the interaction signal produces negative correlation with yield changes over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment (PAYEMS) growth above 200k per month signals tight labor markets and wage pressure. This sustains inflation expectations and justifies Fed rate maintenance. The 10-year Treasury yield rises as the market prices in persistent inflation and the Fed's commitment to restrictive policy.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield declines in more than 55% of months when PAYEMS growth > 200k, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth (GDPC1) decelerates below 1.5% annualized, signaling late-cycle slowdown. This reduces inflation expectations and increases the probability of Fed rate cuts. The 10-year Treasury yield falls as investors reprice lower terminal rates and demand a lower risk premium for duration.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises in more than 50% of instances when GDPC1 growth < 1.5%, or the signal produces Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) decline below 1.3 million units annualized while unemployment (UNRATE) rises above 4.5%, jointly signaling demand destruction and recession risk. This triggers a sharp flight-to-safety rotation into long-duration Treasuries. The 10-year Treasury yield falls as investors reduce equity exposure and reprrice recession probabilities upward.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the joint signal produces positive correlation with yield changes over any 18-month window.
